name: 6-axis-ahrs
description: A robust, standalone 6-Axis (Gyroscope + Accelerometer) Attitude and Heading Reference System (AHRS). Provides two        algorithms: Madgwick gradient descent fusion and Extended Kalman Filter (EKF). Includes adaptive features: impact         detection with fast recovery, linear motion compensation, and automatic gyroscope bias correction.
description_ja: 堅牢なスタンドアロン6軸（ジャイロスコープ＋加速度センサー）AHRS。MadgwickとEKFの2アルゴリズムを提供。衝撃検知・高速リカバリ・線形運動補償・ジャイロバイアス自動補正などの適応機能付き。
